name: agenttape
description: Universal record/replay/diff harness for tool-using AI agents

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @agenttape/core build && pnpm --filter @agenttape/replay-engine build && pnpm --filter @agenttape/diff-engine build && pnpm --filter @agenttape/test-runner build && pnpm --filter @agenttape/adapter-openai build && pnpm --filter @agenttape/integration-claude build && pnpm --filter @agenttape/cli build && pnpm --filter @agenttape/example-support-agent-openai build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @agenttape/core typecheck && pnpm --filter @agenttape/replay-engine typecheck && pnpm --filter @agenttape/diff-engine typecheck && pnpm --filter @agenttape/test-runner typecheck && pnpm --filter @agenttape/adapter-openai typecheck && pnpm --filter @agenttape/integration-claude typecheck && pnpm --filter @agenttape/cli typecheck && pnpm --filter @agenttape/example-support-agent-openai typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm build && pnpm typecheck && pnpm examples:record && pnpm examples:replay && pnpm examples:diff && pnpm examples:test
